attributes.preview:
# MBD4 Full Intelligence Report
**Generated:** 2026-04-25  
**Scope:** ATR/WEE1 synthetic lethality axis + HAP1-MBD4-KO cell line status  
**Data sources:** DepMap 23Q4 (local), PRISM 20Q2 (figshare), cBioPortal TCGA PanCancer Atlas 2018, PMC full-text (PATRIOT, NETc, berzosertib HGSOC trial), Cellosaurus, Revvity/Horizon Discovery

---

## Section 1: HAP1-MBD4-KO Cell Line Status

### Cellosaurus-Confirmed Clones
| Clone | RRID | Catalog | KO Method | Status |
|-------|------|---------|-----------|--------|
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 1 | CVCL_SX48 | HZGHC000921c002 | CRISPR/Cas9, 2bp del | Discontinued |
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 2 | CVCL_SX49 | HZGHC000921c003 | CRISPR/Cas9 | Discontinued |
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 3 | CVCL_SX50 | HZGHC000921c009 | CRISPR/Cas9 | Discontinued |
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 4 | CVCL_SX51 | HZGHC000921c011 | CRISPR/Cas9, 404bp ins | Discontinued |

**All 4 clones discontinued** from Revvity (formerly Horizon Discovery) as of Dec 2024.  
Parent line HAP1 (C631) remains available.

### Only Published Use
**Bortolini Silveira et al., Nat Commun 2024 (PMID 39543136, PMC11564873)**  
- Clone used: HZGHC000921c002 (CVCL_SX48)  
- Measured: CpG>TpG mutation rate by WGS after 120-day culture  
- **No drugs tested** — purely mutational landscape study  
- Contact: Marc-Henri Stern lab for cell sharing agreement

### ATRi/WEE1i Data in HAP1-MBD4-KO
**NONE EXISTS.** No published IC50, AUC, or viability data for any ATRi, WEE1i, or CHK1i in any HAP1-MBD4-KO clone as of April 2026.

### Ordering Path
1. **Revvity "Made to Order"**: Custom HAP1-MBD4-KO, ~8–12 weeks, ~2 clonal vials + WT control
2. **In-house generation**: HAP1 parental (C631, available) + CRISPR/Cas9 targeting MBD4 exon 1/2
3. **Cell sharing**: Contact Stern lab (Bortolini Silveira 2024) for HZGHC000921c002

---
